zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucretia Christine Ripley於1604年1月25日出生在英國英格蘭越可爾包藍德時，她的父親Sir Thomas Rippon Ripley29歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Margaret Jackson25歲。她於1624年與William Humphrey Grizzell在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州艾可拉帕韓諾可結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1636年6月2日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州笛卡爾 拉帕韓諾可享年32歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lucretia Christine Ripley于1604年1月25日出生在英国英格兰越可爾包藍德时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Rippon Ripley29岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Margaret Jackson25岁。她于1624年与William Humphrey Grizzell在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州艾可拉帕韓諾可结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1636年6月2日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州笛卡爾 拉帕韓諾可享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ripley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Ripley (Derbyshire, Hampshire, Surrey, Yorkshire). The Hampshire and Surrey placenames derive from Old English ripel, rippel ‘strip of land’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. The Yorkshire placename probably derives from the Anglian tribe name Hrype + Old English lēah. The Derbyshire placename may derive from Old English ripel, rippel or the Anglian tribe name Hrype + Old English lēah.
History: William Ripley (died 1656) came from Wymondham, Norfolk, England, to Hingham, MA, in 1638.

nameMeanings.name: Lucretia
meanings: A name derived from Lucretia, a celebrated Roman lady, daughter of Lucretius, and wife of Tarquinius Col Latinus; a feminine form of Lucretius, derived from lucrum, gain, profit, advantage. Mr. Arthur says Lucretia is a name proper for a good housewife.

nameMeanings.name: Christine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Christina .  It was popular in the medieval period, when it appears to have been used interchangeably with   Christian  , and again in Britain at the end of the 19th century. In the United States it was particularly popular from the 1950s to the 1970s.

variants.name: Christeen
meanings: form of   Christina .  It was popular in the medieval period, when it appears to have been used interchangeably with   Christian  , and again in Britain at the end of the 19th century. In the United States it was particularly popular from the 1950s to the 1970s.

historicEvents.description: The Virginia Company founded the first permanent English colony at Jamestown in 1607. One of the original 13 states (it entered the Union in 1788). Virginia holds an important place in American history, as it was home to many of the founding fathers, including George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, James Madison, George Mason, and Patrick Henry. Four of Americas first five presidents were Virginians. During the Civil War, Richmond, Virginias capital, was the capital of the Confederacy. Today, Virginia is a popular tourist spot where people can visit historic places such as Alexandria, Williamsburg, and Mount Vernon, George Washingtons estate.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Lucretia Christine Ripley was born on 25 January 1604, in Bowland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Thomas Rippon Ripley, was 29 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Margaret Jackson, was 25. She married William Humphrey Grizzell in 1624, in Rappahannock, Essex, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 2 June 1636, in Old Rappahannock, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucretia Christine Ripley est née le 25 janvier 1604, à Bowland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Rippon Ripley, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Margaret Jackson, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé William Humphrey Grizzell en 1624, à Rappahannock, Essex, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 2 juin 1636, à Old Rappahannock, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 32 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Lucretia Christine Ripleyが1604年1月25日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアボウランドで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Rippon Ripleyは29歳，母Lady Elizabeth Margaret Jacksonは25歳であった。1624年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州エセックスラッパハノックでWilliam Humphrey Grizzellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1636年6月2日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州オルド ラッパハノックで32歳で死去した。

ko.Rappahannock, Virginia, British Colonial: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 드 랩아해노c크
ko.lifeSummary: Lucretia Christine Ripley(이)가 1604년 1월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 보우랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Rippon Ripley(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Margaret Jackson(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1624년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 에세스 랩아해노c크에서 William Humphrey Grizzell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1636년 6월 2일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 드 랩아해노c크에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Rappahannock, Virginia, British Colonial: олд раппаханнокк, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucretia Christine Ripley родилась 25 января 1604 г. в местности боуланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Rippon Ripley было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Margaret Jackson, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Humphrey Grizzell в 1624 г. в местности раппаханнокк, эссекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 2 июня 1636 г. в местности олд раппаханнокк, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 32 лет.
